description: Saya is Ayato's childhood friend. She moved abroad six years ago due to her father's career. She uses a 38th generation Lux grenade launcher Helnekrom but later switches to a type 41 Gleaming Form - twin particle guns Waidenholt and Type 34 wave Motion heavy artillery Ark Van Ders for the Phoenix. Like Kirin, she enters the Phoenix for her father's sake.

description: Tooru is a manga artist who specializes in erotic comics. He is also the most sensitive to others, being the first one to notice changes in the member's moods.

name: Raiha Uesugi
description: Fuutarou's cheerful younger sister. Being the only female and the most family-conscious she is effectively the head of the small household. Her cute facial expressions will often sway others' hearts. Appreciating the hard work Fuutarou does for their family, she sometimes delays the supper until his late return home so she can prepare his favourite meal.

description: __Sigil:__ Worldwide Function __Clan:__ Sunset Ravens A player in Darwin's Game who is an information broker. Her sigil is analogous to Laplace's demon, a hypothetical being that knows the exact location and momentum of every atom in the universe.

name: Tsumugi Inuzuka
description: Kohei's adorable daughter who attends kindergarten. Though energetic, she is well-behaved and loves her father dearly. She always thinks of him and begins to truly enjoy eating when her father and Kotori start making meals together. She has large fluffy hair and is a fan of magical girls. She likes meat, particularly hamburger steak, and doesn't like green peppers.

name: Cinnamon
description: **Breed:** Scottish Fold **Height:** 150 cm The third oldest catgirl in the Minazuki Familly. Cinnamon is typically shy and very cheerful. However, her somewhat active and perverted imagination causes her to interpret various everyday occurrences in a sexual manner and become aroused as a result. She seems rather shameless about this trait as she will do it in public or in front of customers of La Soleil.

description: Jashin-chan is a self-centered serpent who was summoned from Hell by Yurine. She possesses regenerative abilities which allow her to revive herself after her actions lead to bloody vengeance from Yurine. (Source: Jashin-chan Dropkick wiki)
